name: Video to GIF
description: Convert video to GIF locally, nothing leaves your device.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' blob: data:; worker-src 'self'; font-src 'self';
